# Marcus Loo

> Personal portfolio of Marcus Loo — Senior Full Stack Engineer & Project Lead based in Malaysia. Specialises in PHP, Laravel, and Vue.js, with a focus on building scalable, maintainable full-stack web applications.

## About

Marcus Loo is a Senior Full Stack Engineer with experience spanning advertising agencies, start-ups, and large corporations. He is passionate about technology, continuous learning, teamwork, and building accessible, inclusive digital products. His primary stack is PHP-based backend development.

## Experience

- **Project Lead & Senior Full Stack Engineer** — Tess Sdn Bhd (August 2025 – Present): Leads technical planning and execution of internal and external software projects. Designs scalable full-stack solutions including backend services, APIs, and frontend interfaces. Collaborates with stakeholders to refine requirements and optimise system design.

- **System Engineer** — Accea Malaysia (February 2024 – August 2025): Developed and maintained a web order system used internally by staff. Designed features for an express order system for customers. Collaborated cross-functionally to ensure system reliability.

- **Software Developer** — Hitower IT (October 2020 – August 2023): Contributed to a payroll system using Test-Driven Development (TDD). Authored an integrated user manual and participated in stakeholder feedback sessions.

- **Full Stack Developer** — VE Capital Pte. Ltd. (October 2020 – August 2023): Managed and maintained codebase with Laravel and Vue.js. Conducted code reviews, UI/UX reviews, sprint planning, and led a developer team for internal product development.

- **Intern Mobile App Developer** — WOBB / Hiredly (March 2020 – June 2020): Maintained and added features to the WOBB mobile app on Android and iOS. Deployed APKs for alpha testing and managed Google/Facebook analytics integration.

## Skills

- **Languages & Frameworks**: PHP, Laravel, Vue.js, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Databases**: MySQL
- **Practices**: Test-Driven Development (TDD), REST API design, software architecture, code review
- **Other**: Mobile app development (Android/iOS), project management, sprint planning

## Projects

### [Laravel Rapid Development Toolkit](/projects/laravel-base)

**Subtitle**: Internal Library — *Eliminate boilerplate. Ship faster. Stay consistent.*
**Tech**: PHP, Laravel, MySQL

**What it is**: A reusable internal toolkit built on top of Laravel to accelerate the development of custom business applications by eliminating repetitive CRUD implementation and enforcing a consistent architecture across all projects.

**Problem it solves**:
- CRUD interfaces rebuilt from scratch for every module
- Manually re-implementing validation, search, and REST APIs
- Repeated setup for roles, permissions, and file handling
- Slower delivery timelines due to boilerplate overhead
- Inconsistent implementations drifting across projects
- Reduced focus on actual business logic

**Solution**: A base model-driven system where extending a single core class automatically enables a full suite of built-in features. Each entity instantly supports CRUD operations, configurable features, and a consistent structure across the entire application.

**Capabilities**:
- Auto CRUD Generation — Prebuilt create/read/update/delete flows with override support for custom business logic.
- File Management — Built-in file upload and storage handling, abstracted away from each module.
- Import / Export System — Standardised data import and export functionality available out of the box.
- Search & Filtering — Configurable searchable columns defined directly on the model, no query boilerplate.
- Dynamic Index Views — Define which fields appear in listing pages via model configuration, not view files.
- Roles & Permissions — Access control system available out of the box, integrated into every generated route.

**Usage example**:
```php
class Product extends BaseModel
{
    protected $searchable  = ['name', 'sku'];      // columns that are searchable
    protected $indexFields = ['name', 'price', 'stock']; // columns shown on index
    protected $files = ['image'];                  // file columns, auto-stored
    protected $hasApiResource = true;              // register API routes
    protected $hasAdminResource = true;            // register Admin routes
}
```
Minimal configuration enables a fully functional CRUD module with search, API endpoints, and UI support.

**Before vs After**:
- Before: Build CRUD logic for every module individually; manually implement validation, search, and APIs; repeated setup for roles, permissions, and file handling.
- After: Only implement business-specific logic; core features available instantly via model extension; consistent structure enforced across all modules.

**Impact**:
- 70–80% reduction in development time
- ~1 week to deliver a customised system
- 100% consistent architecture across projects
- Near-zero repetitive boilerplate per module
